title: More Wolfs
description: Add new variants for minecraft wolfs and dogs.
body:
More Wolfs is a mod that adds new variants for minecraft wolfs and dogs. These can be found all over the minecraft overworld in various biomes like plains or meadow. These variants are a nice addition to the variants added by mojang recently. 


## Variants:


<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

White Spotted
Can be found in stony shore biome.

</details>




<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

Mountain
Can be found in meadow biome.

</details>




<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

Golden
Can be found in flower forest biome.

</details>




<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

Patch
Can be found in plains biome.

</details>




<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

Fluffy
Can be found in birch forest biome.

</details>




<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

White Fluffy
Can be found in snowy plains biome.

</details>




<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

Black Fluffy
Can be found in dark forest biome.

</details>




<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

Ginger
Can be found in cherry groove biome.


</details>



<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

Tricolor
Can be found in sunflower plains biome.

</details>
